All equipment have to be assembled at site and transportation to the installation location shall be completely knock down manner.
The equipment shall be selected as per the maximum load considered and floor loading designed. The equipment of higher weight than designed will not be accepted.

Contractor to survey the site before submission of quotation for transportation path clearance, door sizes, equipment movement path, equipment erection possibilities, sequences of erection, obstacles during installation, etc.

Contractor to develop the required electrical load list as per the selected equipment and coordinate with the electrical contractor for the requirement of power. The power shall be within the designed limit.  The equipment of higher power requirement than designed will not be accepted.
The vibration of all equipment shall be within the allowable limit.

Design, Supply, Installation, Testing & Commissioning (SITC) of an Natural Gas-Based Fire Fighting System (using inert gases such as IG-541 ), UL/FM approved, fully compliant with NFPA 2001 (latest edition)  for total flooding applications in specified enclosures.
The system shall be designed as a clean, environmentally friendly, and human-safe fire suppression solution and shall include but not be limited to the following components:

Design & Engineering - Agent quantity calculation and complete hydraulic flow analysis as per NFPA 2001, System design to ensure extinguishing concentration is achieved within 60 seconds or as per NFPA, Proper nozzle placement and coverage to avoid dead zones.

Alarm & Warning Devices - Audio-Visual Pre-discharge Alarm: Hooters and Flashing Strobes inside and outside protected rooms, Discharge Indicator Lamps, Pressure Switches for cylinder discharge confirmation.
Accessories & Trim - Check valves, isolation valves, pressure relief valves, strainers, gauges, and fittings as required, All supporting materials, grooved couplings, brackets, and hangers.

Testing & Commissioning - Room Integrity Test (Door Fan Test) to verify enclosure tightness and hold time requirements, Functional testing of detection, alarm, control, and manual activation features, Hydrostatic test certificates for cylinders and piping pressure test.

Compliance & Approvals - Cylinders shall be PESO approved (India statutory requirement).,  All components shall be UL Listed / FM Approved, System designed, installed, and tested as per NFPA 2001 and local AHJ requirements.
CUB1, MCC Room ( 32 M X 10 M X 5 M) and Battery Room( 5M X 4 M X 5 M approx). The final design shall be based on the actual room size.
FAB 1, UPS Room ( 8.3 M X 4.7 M X 7.5 M). The final design shall be based on the actual room size.
High-pressure inert gas cylinder (IG-541), seamless steel, PESO approved, 300-bar working pressure, complete with identification label and protective cap.
UL/FM approved cylinder valve assembly for IG-541, complete with safety burst disc, pressure gauge, and valve outlet fittings.
Electrical actuator (solenoid) for cylinder valve, 24 VDC, UL/FM listed, complete with diode and mounting accessories.
Pneumatic actuator for cylinder valve, UL/FM listed, complete with tubing and fittings.
Manual actuator / manual release device for cylinder valve, UL/FM listed.
Constant-flow / pressure-regulating device to limit discharge pressure to system design value (max. 60 bar), UL/FM listed.
Flexible high-pressure discharge hose with non-return valve (NRV), UL/FM approved, suitable for IG-541 service.
Cylinder valve supervisory / monitoring switch for valve status indication.
Floor-mounted steel cylinder rack / support frame with anchoring accessories and protective cage, suitable for discharge and seismic loads.
Pilot / control gas cylinder, PESO & UL/FM approved, complete with valve and accessories.
Pressure reducer / regulator for pilot gas system, UL/FM listed.
Pilot hose with fittings and O-rings, UL/FM approved.
Shuttle non-return valve (NRV) for pilot line, UL/FM approved.
Bleed valve / safety valve for pilot line protection.
Supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of reset tool for electromagnetic actuator, complete with protective cap and associated accessories.
Pressure gauge for pilot gas cylinder and pilot line.
Providing and applying approved fire sealant at all locations where pipes penetrate walls, complete as per specifications
Design, Supply and Installation of Modular pipe support system / fabricated steel supports with anchors and fasteners.
Discharge nozzles, UL/FM approved, 360° / 180° type, sized as per approved hydraulic calculations.
Pressure switch / flow switch for discharge confirmation, UL/FM approved.
Pressure relief device for discharge manifold, UL/FM approved.
Selector valve, UL/FM approved, suitable for IG-541 discharge system (where multi-zone protection is required).
Manual selector valve operating lever with accessories.
Pneumatic selector valve control unit with control gas accessories.
Fire-rated pressure relief damper for protected enclosure, complete with calculation, installation, and testing.
FIRE DETECTION & GAS RELEASE CONTROL SYSTEM
Gas Release Control Panel, UL/FM listed, compliant with NFPA 72 & NFPA 2001, complete with minimum 24-hour battery backup.
Abort-cum-Manual Release Station, UL/FM approved, including wiring to the gas release control panel.
Audible alarm (hooter/horn) for pre-discharge and discharge warning, 24 VDC, including cabling and installation.
Visual alarm (strobe) for pre-discharge and discharge warning, 24 VDC, including cabling and installation.

Public Address (PA) speaker for evacuation announcements inside protected areas, complete with back box, mounting accessories, and cabling, integrated with the fire alarm / gas release logic as per NFPA 72.
Evacuation indicator light with illuminated message “EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY”, UL/FM approved, including cabling and installation.
Gas discharge indicator light with illuminated message “GAS DISCHARGE – DO NOT ENTER”, UL/FM approved, including cabling and installation.
Fire-rated control cabling (2-core × 1.5 sq.mm), conduits, junction boxes, terminations, testing, and identification
Surface preparation and painting of exposed piping and steel supports (SA 2½, epoxy primer + fire-red epoxy finish).
Door Fan (Enclosure Integrity) Test in accordance with NFPA 2001, including certified report.
Actual IG-541 discharge test in accordance with NFPA 2001, including post-discharge reinstatement and test report.
